tasks: [Review and optimize large asset images in assets/ folder - compress Voyages.jpg, CIEMT.jpg, LGP.jpg, GPTBUDDY.png, PRO.jpg to reduce load times and improve Lighthouse scores]
[Create comprehensive content plan - define hero tagline, bio text, skills list, project descriptions, and contact form fields based on IDEA.md specifications]
[Redesign and build complete Hero section with Lane Smith name, tagline, CTA button, and subtle fade-in animation]
[Build About section with bio text, photo placeholder (using one of the optimized assets), and professional styling with dark/light mode variants]
[Create Skills showcase section with icon-based skill tags and progress indicators using Tailwind utility classes]
[Build Project Portfolio grid section with 3-6 project cards including project thumbnails, descriptions, and tech stack badges]
[Create Contact section with functional form layout, social media links, and email display with proper ARIA labels for accessibility]
[Implement and test dark mode toggle functionality with proper localStorage persistence and body class toggling]
[Add smooth scroll animations and intersection observer animations for sections as they come into viewport]
[Ensure mobile-responsive design across all sections with Tailwind's responsive prefixes and hamburger menu if needed]
[Update all example page templates (example1, example2) to match new design system and remove duplicate "Built Using" tables]
[Set up GitHub Pages deployment with proper _config.yml, CNAME file, and deploy scripts in package.json]
[Run final Lighthouse audit and optimize for 90+ scores on performance, accessibility, and best practices]
[Write README.md with setup instructions, deployment guide, and project documentation]

project_summary: Transforming a basic "Under Construction" portfolio skeleton into a polished, professional portfolio website for Lane Smith with hero section, about bio, skills, project showcase, contact form, animations, dark mode polish, and GitHub Pages deployment.
